_comment: Copy this file to targets.json (gitignored) and fill in real values. Never commit targets.json. The bodyguard skill reads this to know what to scan for.

addresses.current: street only, no number — used only for checking exposure, not stored in detail
prior: previous city / state if within last 5 years

partner._note: Only fill this if partner has consented. Stalkers pivot through partners constantly.
